## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Client Operations role at growthx.ai and explore Guy's potential fit and interest.](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is seeking a Client Operations lead to build systems, processes, and tools for their rapidly growing customer base](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Guy has relevant experience in RevOps, growth, and building internal tools/automations](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Compensation expectations align (\~$200k), with potential for contract work to start earlier](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2478.0)
  - [Next steps include Guy speaking with Kyle (client org lead) and possibly completing a take-home exercise](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai Business Overview

  - [Recently onboarded to Deal (HR software), experiencing rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [High-value contracts ($20k/month) with 90-day pilots and 12-month terms](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Currently have a waitlist of customers due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Profitable as of January, not burning cash like typical startups](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Client Operations Role

  - [Focus on post-sales processes, tools, and systems to support customer success](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Key priorities: reducing churn risk, improving customer satisfaction measurement (CSAT/NPS), and optimizing team structure/headcount planning](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Role requires understanding of go-to-market/customer-facing business and ability to build systems from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Potential to expand scope beyond client ops in the future as the company grows](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2334.0)

### Current Customer Success Structure

  - [Three-tiered approach: strategists (former heads of SEO), managing editors, and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Mostly offshore team for high margins, with varying ratios between tiers](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Weekly customer meetings to review content and progress](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Using tools like Slack, Notion, and AirOps for project management](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Guy's Relevant Experience

  - [Implemented tools like Unify for automated outbound and High Touch for data syncing between systems](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Built internal "ops tool" at current company to manage invoice factoring business](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Experience with growth PM responsibilities, focusing on conversion rate optimization and removing friction in application processes](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

### Technology Stack and Development

  - [Currently heavily reliant on AirOps, but planning to transition off](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
  - [Small engineering team (2-3 engineers) working on building internal platform](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2506.0)
  - [Goal to have a proprietary mini-platform within 6 months to showcase technology](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)

### Compensation and Timing

  - [Guy's expectation: Around $200k, which aligns with growthx.ai's range for US-based candidates](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)
  - [Potential April start date, pending Guy's current company acquisition details](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2607.0)
  - [Possibility of contract work to start earlier if timing aligns](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to arrange a meeting between Guy and Kyle (client org lead)](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)
  - [Consider implementing a take-home exercise/group brainstorming session](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Bridget to involve Marilia (new recruiter) in coordination of next steps](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2784.0)
  - [Guy to provide updates on his current company's acquisition timeline when available](https://fathom.video/share/bQDmH43XQvPVQsMxAUUgEzHmqF4xS6hz?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
